seoTitle: Upper Bylong vs Upper Colo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Bylong and Upper Colo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Bylong vs Upper Colo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Bylong and Upper Colo.
heading: Upper Bylong vs Upper Colo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Bylong, New South Wales and Upper Colo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Bylong has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Upper Colo (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Bylong or Upper Colo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Bylong has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Upper Colo scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Bylong scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Colo scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Bylong or Upper Colo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Bylong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
